name: environment_heat_dome_stresses_kestrel_st_lt
premise: A pipeline pressure anomaly coincided with a landowner’s unauthorized valve work; liability is unclear and the line remains pressurized. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment heat dome stresses kestrel st lt has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Nadia Kim
agents.identity: I am Nadia Kim, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Talia Ishikawa, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Nadia Kim must choose under short term versus long term. What does Nadia Kim do?
